mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from sys_role where deleted = 0 order by id asc

select r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.status, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.deleted from sys_role r inner join sys_user_role ur on r.id = ur.role_id and ur.deleted = 0 where r.deleted = 0 and ur.user_id = #{userId} order by r.id asc

select from sys_role where deleted = 0 and id in
#{id}
